name.description: The monitored file or directory path

index.description: Destination index for the monitored data

sourcetype.description: Source type assigned to the monitored data

source.description: Source value assigned to the monitored data

host.description: Host value assigned to the monitored data

disabled.description: Whether the monitor input is disabled

followTail.description: If true, monitoring starts at the end of file. If false, monitoring starts from the beginning.

whitelist.description: Regex pattern for files to include

blacklist.description: Regex pattern for files to exclude

crcSalt.description: String to add to the CRC calculation

ignoreOlderThan.description: Time modifier to skip files that have not been modified within the specified time
